# Klima- og miljødepartementet

*26 lover*

| Lov | Korttittel | Lovdata | Historikk |
|-----|-----------|---------|-----------|
| [Lov om Perlefiskeriet](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1845-06-07.md) | Lov om Perlefiskeriet | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1845-06-07) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1845-06-07.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1845-06-07.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1845-06-07.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1845-06-07.md) |
| [Lov om bevaring og bærekraftig bruk av marint naturmangfold i områder utenfor na](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-05-27-21.md) | Lov om bevaring og bærekraftig bruk av marint naturmangfold i områder utenfor nasjonal jurisdiksjon | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-05-27-21) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-05-27-21.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-05-27-21.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-05-27-21.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-05-27-21.md) |
| [Lov om bærekraftige produkter og verdikjeder (bærekraftige produkter-loven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2024-06-25-69.md) | Bærekraftige produkter-loven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2024-06-25-69) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2024-06-25-69.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2024-06-25-69.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2024-06-25-69.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2024-06-25-69.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i klimakvoteloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2011-04-15-12.md) | Endringslov til klimakvoteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2011-04-15-12) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2011-04-15-12.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2011-04-15-12.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2011-04-15-12.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2011-04-15-12.md) |
| [Lov om endringer i naturmangfoldloven (forbud mot næringsmessig uttak av myr)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-12-22-130.md) | Endringslov til naturmangfoldloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-12-22-130) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-12-22-130.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-12-22-130.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-12-22-130.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-12-22-130.md) |
| [Lov om fiskeretten i Tanavassdraget (Tanaloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2014-06-20-51.md) | Tanaloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2014-06-20-51) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2014-06-20-51.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2014-06-20-51.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2014-06-20-51.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2014-06-20-51.md) |
| [Lov om forskjellige forhold vedkommende Røros Kobberverks Skogvæsen](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1901-05-29-6.md) | Lov om Røros Kobberverks Skogvæsen | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1901-05-29-6) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1901-05-29-6.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1901-05-29-6.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1901-05-29-6.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1901-05-29-6.md) |
| [Lov om forvaltning av naturens mangfold (naturmangfoldloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-19-100.md) | Naturmangfoldloven – nml | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2009-06-19-100) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-06-19-100.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2009-06-19-100.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2009-06-19-100.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2009-06-19-100.md) |
| [Lov om framstilling og bruk av genmodifiserte organismer m.m. (genteknologiloven](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1993-04-02-38.md) | Genteknologiloven – gentl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1993-04-02-38) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1993-04-02-38.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1993-04-02-38.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1993-04-02-38.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1993-04-02-38.md) |
| [Lov om fredning og fangst av isbjørn [isbjørnloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1957-03-22-4.md) | Isbjørnloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1957-03-22-4) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1957-03-22-4.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1957-03-22-4.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1957-03-22-4.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1957-03-22-4.md) |
| [Lov om friluftslivet (friluftsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1957-06-28-16.md) | Friluftsloven – fril | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1957-06-28-16) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1957-06-28-16.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1957-06-28-16.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1957-06-28-16.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1957-06-28-16.md) |
| [Lov om gjennomføring i norsk rett av miljøvernkonvensjon mellom Norge, Danmark, ](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1976-04-09-21.md) | Lov om nordisk miljøvernkonvensjon | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1976-04-09-21) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1976-04-09-21.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1976-04-09-21.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1976-04-09-21.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1976-04-09-21.md) |
| [Lov om jakt og fangst av vilt (viltloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) | Viltloven – viltl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1981-05-29-38) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1981-05-29-38.md) |
| [Lov om klimamål (klimaloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2017-06-16-60.md) | Klimaloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2017-06-16-60) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2017-06-16-60.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2017-06-16-60.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2017-06-16-60.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2017-06-16-60.md) |
| [Lov om kommunale vass- og avløpsanlegg (vass- og avløpsanleggslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2012-03-16-12.md) | Vass- og avløpsanleggslova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2012-03-16-12) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2012-03-16-12.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2012-03-16-12.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2012-03-16-12.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2012-03-16-12.md) |
| [Lov om kommunale vass- og avløpsanlegg (vass- og avløpsanleggslova)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-06-26.md) | Vass- og avløpsanleggslova | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-06-26) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-06-26.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-06-06-26.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-06-26.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-06-26.md) |
| [Lov om kulturminner [kulturminneloven]](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1978-06-09-50.md) | Kulturminneloven – kulml | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1978-06-09-50) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1978-06-09-50.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1978-06-09-50.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1978-06-09-50.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1978-06-09-50.md) |
| [Lov om kvoteplikt og handel med kvoter for utslipp av klimagasser (klimakvotelov](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2004-12-17-99.md) | Klimakvoteloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2004-12-17-99) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2004-12-17-99.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2004-12-17-99.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2004-12-17-99.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2004-12-17-99.md) |
| [Lov om laksefisk og innlandsfisk mv. (lakse- og innlandsfiskloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1992-05-15-47.md) | Lakse- og innlandsfiskloven – laksfl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1992-05-15-47) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1992-05-15-47.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1992-05-15-47.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1992-05-15-47.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1992-05-15-47.md) |
| [Lov om miljøvern på Svalbard (svalbardmiljøloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2001-06-15-79.md) | Svalbardmiljøloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2001-06-15-79) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2001-06-15-79.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2001-06-15-79.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2001-06-15-79.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2001-06-15-79.md) |
| [Lov om motorferdsel i utmark og vassdrag (motorferdselloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1977-06-10-82.md) | Motorferdselloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1977-06-10-82) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1977-06-10-82.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1977-06-10-82.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1977-06-10-82.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1977-06-10-82.md) |
| [Lov om naturområder i Oslo og nærliggende kommuner (markaloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2009-06-05-35.md) | Markaloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2009-06-05-35) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2009-06-05-35.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2009-06-05-35.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2009-06-05-35.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2009-06-05-35.md) |
| [Lov om rett til miljøinformasjon og deltakelse i offentlige beslutningsprosesser](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2003-05-09-31.md) | Miljøinformasjonsloven – mlinfl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2003-05-09-31) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2003-05-09-31.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2003-05-09-31.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2003-05-09-31.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2003-05-09-31.md) |
| [Lov om statlig naturoppsyn (naturoppsynsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1996-06-21-38.md) | Naturoppsynsloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1996-06-21-38) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1996-06-21-38.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1996-06-21-38.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1996-06-21-38.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1996-06-21-38.md) |
| [Lov om vern av marin natur utenfor territorialfarvannet (havvernloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-2025-06-10-33.md) | Havvernloven | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/2025-06-10-33) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-2025-06-10-33.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-2025-06-10-33.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-2025-06-10-33.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-2025-06-10-33.md) |
| [Lov om vern mot forurensninger og om avfall (forurensningsloven)](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/main/lover/lov-1981-03-13-6.md) | Forurensningsloven – forurl | [lovdata.no](https://lovdata.no/dokument/NL/lov/1981-03-13-6) | [log](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/commits/law-history/lover/lov-1981-03-13-6.md) · [v2024](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2024/lover/lov-1981-03-13-6.md) · [v2025](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2025/lover/lov-1981-03-13-6.md) · [v2026](https://github.com/sondreskarsten/norwegian-laws/blob/v2026/lover/lov-1981-03-13-6.md) |
